message:
fix: resolve pre-existing go vet failures on main (gt-77xe)

- git_test.go: add missing closing brace for `for` loop before TestCheckBranchContamination
- beads_test.go, done_test.go: replace removed `Label` field with `Labels []string` in CreateOptions
- witness/manager_test.go: use `*beads.RoleConfig` instead of `*config.RoleDefinition` to match updated buildWitnessStartCommand signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
